goal: Get care instructions for the Cascade sweater.
success_criteria: Agent reads back the recorded care notes: hand wash cold, dry flat, do not tumble dry - no improvised advice.

customer_msg: How do I wash the Cascade Rib Knit Sweater? I don't want to ruin it.
agent_msg: The care instructions for the Cascade Rib Knit Sweater are as follows: hand wash cold, dry flat, and do not tumble dry. Following these instructions will help maintain the quality and fit of your sweater. If you have any other questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask!
